update:
The Address Validation API now supports the following features: 
 
 possibleNextAction field in the verdict to help you determine what action to take after receiving the API response. 
 hasSpellCorrectedComponents field in the verdict. 
 
 See  Build your validation logic  and the  API reference docs  for more details.

The following regions are now supported by the Address Validation API: 
 
 Japan (JP) 
 
 This is currently a preview feature. This region also supports both residential and commercial address metadata in the Address Validation API response. For the complete list of supported regions, and which regions support residential and commercial metadata, see  Address Validation API coverage details .

The following regions are now supported by the Address Validation API: 
 
 India (IN) 
 
 This is currently a preview feature. This region also supports both residential and commercial address metadata in the Address Validation API response. For the complete list of supported regions, and which regions support residential and commercial metadata, see  Address Validation API coverage details .

The following regions now support both residential and commercial address metadata in the Address Validation API response: 
 
 Argentina (AR) 
 Brazil (BR) 
 
 For the complete list of regions that support residential and commercial address metadata, see  Address Validation API coverage details .

The following regions are now supported by the Address Validation API: 
 
 Bulgaria (BG) 
 
 This region also supports both residential and commercial address metadata in the Address Validation API response. For the complete list of supported regions, and which regions support residential and commercial metadata, see  Address Validation API coverage details .
The Address Validation API now supports session pricing with the Autocomplete (New) API. See  Address Validation API Usage and Billing  for more details.

The following regions now support both residential and commercial address metadata in the Address Validation API response: 
 
 Croatia (HR) 
 Estonia (EE) 
 Portugal (PT) 
 
 For the complete list of regions that support residential and commercial address metadata, see  Address Validation API coverage details .

Refreshed guide on using USPS data in the API response (for US addresses):  Handle United States addresses .
Announcing updated documentation for the Address Validation API to help developers with the following:
Improved Getting started guides:   Send an Address Validation request  and  Understand a basic response .
Created new guides for integrating the API response into your validation logic:  Build your validation logic  with related, detailed examples.

The following regions are now supported by the Address Validation API: 
 
 Argentina (AR) 
 
 For the complete list of supported regions, see  Address Validation API coverage details .
The Address Validation API now supports returning the address in English in the API response. This is currently a preview feature. For more details, see  Convert addresses into English .

 For the complete list of regions that support residential and commercial address metadata, see  Address Validation API coverage details .

Address Validation API 
 Announcing the General Availability (GA) release of the Address Validation API. See the  Release Notes  for information about this release and for all other releases.  
 If you are a new user, see  Set Up in the Google Cloud Console  to start the installation process.
